verse_text: And so it was, when Moses held up his hands, that Israel prevailed; but when he let down his hands, Amalek prevailed.

links.context: , 2 It is probable that Ben Sirach is speaking of the incident in [[EXO.17:8]]-13 when Joshua defeated the Amalekites. Joshua prevailed in battle as long as Moses lifted up his hands, holding the rod of God in them. Due to Moses' fatigue, it became necessary for Aaron and Hur to support his arms until the battle ended. The name Joshua means savior.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
